title: Occupancy Rate KPI for Egyptian Hotels
formula: (Total Number of Room Nights Sold / Total Number of Available Room Nights) * 100
description: The Occupancy Rate KPI measures the percentage of available rooms that are occupied over a specific period. It is a critical indicator of hotel performance, reflecting demand and efficiency in room sales. In the Egyptian market, maintaining a high occupancy rate is essential for maximizing revenue and ensuring competitive positioning, particularly in popular tourist destinations like Cairo and Sharm El Sheikh.
